title: Interaction Resources, Typed Parts, Conversation State, and Retention
description: The agent concatenates messages into text, loses function-call identity, assumes previous_interaction_id preserves tools and system instruction, and cannot explain provider retention. Learners cumulatively produce typed Gemini interaction and state ledger through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Model each interaction with stable local identity, provider interaction ID, parent, state mode, timestamps, model, configuration, and outcome.
Preserve text, function call, function result, image, file, refusal, safety, and model-output parts without lossy string flattening.
Use previous_interaction_id deliberately, distinguish server-side history from stateless replay, and preserve local audit evidence.
